title: ranunculus × lutarius
intro: Ranunculus × lutarius, also known as the Buttercup, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The plant has several health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, treating skin conditions, and exhibiting potential antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. The herbal preparations of Ranunculus × lutarius typically involve drying the plant parts, infusing them in water or oil, or creating tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
